sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32304" key="e)kla/ktisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκλάκτ-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n32304.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dance,</tr_> in which the legs are <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrown up behind, fling,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:102" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.102</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
